note: MUST + SHOULD infra items rebuilt as TypeScript-package equivalents. The 28 DON'T-priority items (examples/**, package-lock.json files, CHANGELOG.md, _config.yml, .npmrc, .eslintignore) are intentionally excluded per rebuild-principles (skip [DON'T]). schema.json was already ported to TS in the domain slice (src/config/types.ts + schema.ts) and is mapped there.

mappings.rationale: Rewritten manifest: dual ESM+CJS exports map, types, engines>=18, amqplib peerDep, tsup/vitest/eslint scripts, files=[dist].
Release-triggered npm publish preserved; adds typecheck+build before publish (dist is the published artifact), Node 20, provenance.
CI with rabbitmq service; Node matrix updated to 18/20/22/24; typecheck+lint+build+vitest; RASCAL_TEST_BROKER enables integration suites.
airbnb-base .eslintrc.json modernized to a flat typescript-eslint config (src rules).
Test-globals/no-shadow override folded into the test/** block of the flat eslint config (Vitest provides globals).
Pre-commit hook: lint-staged + typecheck (husky v9 format).
Excludes src/test/config from the package; dist is the published artifact (also enforced by files=[dist]).
MIT license carried over verbatim (with added copyright holder).
README adapted for the TS rebuild: dual-format usage, 9-export API table, migration notes; exhaustive config reference linked upstream.
